args: FILE=$(find "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline" -name 'verify-findings.json' 2>/dev/null | head -1); FILE=${FILE:-"${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline/verify-findings.json"}; if [ -f "$FILE" ] && { ! command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 || jq -e . "$FILE" >/dev/null 2>&1; }; then STATUS=$(command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && jq -r '.status // "UNKNOWN"' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || echo 'UNKNOWN'); printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"[verify] stopped — status=%s, findings at %s"}}' "$STATUS" "$FILE"; else echo '[orchestrator] BLOCKED: verify exited without valid findings JSON. Re-invoke write_findings before stopping.' >&2; exit 2; fi

P="${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline"; { printf '# Pipeline Snapshot — %s
' "$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"; for f in verify-findings.json; do [ -f "$P/$f" ] && { printf '## %s
' "$f"; cat "$P/$f"; echo; }; done; [ -f "$P/progress.md" ] && { printf '## progress.md
'; cat "$P/progress.md"; echo; }; } > "$P/pre-compact-snapshot.md" 2>/dev/null || true

FILE=$(find "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.claude/pipeline" -name 'verify-findings.json' 2>/dev/null | head -1); [ -f "$FILE" ] && command -v jq >/dev/null 2>&1 && STATUS=$(jq -r '.status // "UNKNOWN"' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null) && PIPELINE=$(jq -r 'if .pipeline then .pipeline else "default" end' "$FILE" 2>/dev/null) && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"additionalContext":"[verify-findings] status=%s pipeline=%s — findings ready at %s"}}' "$STATUS" "$PIPELINE" "$FILE" || true
